title: SaaS Master Services Agreement
contract_text: Master SaaS Agreement between Acme Corp and BetaSoft Inc.

clauses.text: BetaSoft grants Acme a non-exclusive license to use the platform during the Term.
Acme shall indemnify BetaSoft against all claims arising from Acme's use, including BetaSoft's own negligence.
This Agreement renews automatically for one-year terms unless terminated with 90 days written notice.
BetaSoft may terminate at any time, for any reason, without notice and without refund.
All fees are due net 30. Late payments accrue interest at 1.5% per month.
BetaSoft's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed fees paid in the prior 12 months.
This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
